heading: Omitted
label: 241 to 248b Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 241 to 248b, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 241, acts , ; , , empowered Secretary to deputize officers and employees of the Department as law enforcement officers.June 26, 1906, ch. 3547, § 1234 Stat. 480Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736Section 242, acts , ; , , related to jurisdiction of prosecutions for violations of sections 230 to 239, 241, and 242 of this title.June 26, 1906, ch. 3547, § 1434 Stat. 481Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736Section 243, acts , ; , , prohibited fishing by aliens and permitted sales to aliens.June 14, 1906, ch. 3299, § 134 Stat. 263June 25, 1938, ch. 68952 Stat. 1174Section 244, , , prescribed penalties for violations of sections 243 to 247 of this title.act June 14, 1906, ch. 3299, § 234 Stat. 264Section 245, , , provided for jurisdiction of prosecutions under sections 243 to 247 of this title.act June 14, 1906, ch. 3299, § 334 Stat. 264Section 246, acts , ; , ; , §§ 1, 20, , 561, authorized searches and seizures of vessels.June 14, 1906, ch. 3299, § 434 Stat. 264Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736Aug. 4, 1949, ch. 39363 Stat. 495Section 247, acts , ; , ; , ; , §§ 1, 20, , 561, empowered Secretary to promulgate rules and regulations to carry into effect provisions of sections 243 to 246 of this title.June 14, 1906, ch. 3299, § 534 Stat. 264Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736Jan. 28, 1915, ch. 20, § 138 Stat. 800Aug. 4, 1949, ch. 39363 Stat. 495Section 248, acts , ; , §§ 1, 2, , provided for protection of walruses.Aug. 18, 1941, ch. 368, § 155 Stat. 632June 29, 1956, ch. 46070 Stat. 372Section 248a, , , prescribed duties of law enforcement officers, and for forfeiture of equipment of convicted persons.act Aug. 18, 1941, ch. 368, § 255 Stat. 633Section 248b, , , defined terms used in sections 248 to 248b of this title.act Aug. 18, 1941, ch. 368, § 355 Stat. 633
